DEEP LEARNING FULL TOPIC LIST (0 → 100%)

1. Deep Learning Foundations
- What is Deep Learning
- Neural Network Basics
- Perceptron
- Layers (Input, Hidden, Output)
- Activation Functions (ReLU, Sigmoid, Tanh, Softmax)
- Forward Propagation
- Loss Functions
- Backpropagation
- Gradient Descent (Batch, Mini-batch, SGD)

2. Math for Deep Learning
- Linear Algebra (Vectors, Matrices)
- Matrix Multiplication
- Eigenvalues & Eigenvectors
- Calculus (Derivatives, Chain Rule)
- Probability Basics

3. Optimization Techniques
- Learning Rate
- Optimizers (SGD, Adam, RMSprop, Adagrad)
- Weight Initialization
- Vanishing & Exploding Gradients
- Gradient Clipping
- Batch Normalization

4. Regularization Techniques
- L1 / L2 Regularization
- Dropout
- Early Stopping
- Data Augmentation

5. Feedforward Neural Networks (ANN)
- Fully Connected Networks
- Multilayer Perceptron (MLP)
- Regression & Classification with ANN

6. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN)
- Convolution Operation
- Filters & Feature Maps
- Padding & Stride
- Pooling (Max, Average)
- CNN Architectures (LeNet, AlexNet, VGG, ResNet, EfficientNet)

7. Recurrent Neural Networks (RNN)
- Sequential Data Handling
- Vanilla RNN
- LSTM (Long Short-Term Memory)
- GRU (Gated Recurrent Unit)
- Bidirectional RNN

8. Sequence Modeling
- Time Series Prediction
- Text Sequence Modeling
- Encoder-Decoder Architecture
- Seq2Seq Models

9. Attention Mechanism
- Attention Basics
- Self-Attention
- Bahdanau Attention
- Luong Attention

10. Transformers (Bridge to LLM)
- Transformer Architecture
- Multi-Head Attention
- Positional Encoding
- Encoder vs Decoder
- BERT Basics
- GPT Basics
- T5 Model

11. Generative Deep Learning
- Autoencoders (AE)
- Variational Autoencoders (VAE)
- Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN)
- Diffusion Models (intro)

12. Transfer Learning

- Fine-tuning
- Feature Extraction
